text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
WOOHOOOOO! The Fan Fest is here!<n>LEEET'S
GOOO!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This is the day of sweet forbidden<n>reversals,
where rules are tossed<n>out! Today, Umamusume
support the<n>fans, like me! I don't know if my
heart —Gwafassdfh!
choice_data_list: Now hold on just a second!
Now hold on just a second!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What is it? I'm pretty busy today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Um... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat?! No one told me that! But I<n>wanna
forget about the Twinkle<n>Series for a day and
enjoy myself as<n>a simple fan...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Who could possibly benefit from<n>seeing me?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I drag a griping Agnes Digital to the<n>autograph
booth.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Th-there's quite a few people in myline too... Wh-wh-what kind ofweirdos are they?)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe they've mistaken my line for<n>someone
else's? Like, I don't have a<n>drop of anything like
Creek's<n>motherly charm in me, no matter how
hard you squeeze...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Agh, the first person in line is coming<n>this way!)

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Digi! I'm a big fan!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But... why?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Um. I mean. Thank you so kindly...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I don't really have any new<n>publications to
distribute, but If you'd<n>like to, I'd love to chat with
you about<n>Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As these interactions continue, Agnes<n>Digital
gradually grows more<n>comfortable talking with her
fans.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Here's the autograph and<n>message,
sent to your @!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll also throw in a copy of "Bottle<n>Passed from
Turf to Dirt" as a little<n>extra. I had leftover stock,
so I figured<n>I'd take the Fan Fest as an
opporunity to share it...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, thank you! I'm so glad I came<n>today! I like
you more and more every<n>second!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
To think even a shoddy excuse for an<n>oshi like me
has fans watching...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I g-guess so. I'm always on the other<n>side of the
table, which is why...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I get it! I understand the fan's<n>feelings far
better than the feelings of<n>those who receive their
praise!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So if I put myself in their shoes, it's<n>easy to
imagine the responses they<n>want to hear.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems Agnes Digital has a firm<n>hold on what it
takes to make her<n>fans happy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's keep this up! I don't want<n>anyone
leaving disappointed because<n>there wasn't
enough time for their<n>turn.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In fact, when it comes to my fans, I<n>don't know
the meaning of the word<n>"disappoint"!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital spends the<n>whole day
working herself ragged for<n>her fans.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. When you really look at it,<n>there's a lot of
room for improvement<n>at this event.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With just a few adjustments, we<n>could make
things better for both the<n>fans and the
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nyehehe. Hey... Once the autograph<n>session is
over, can we go around<n>and make some quick
edits?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Just gimme your permission, and I'll<n>show you
exactly how passionate a<n>promoter I can be.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo! I knew you'd get it. You<n>understand how
the fans feel! Leave<n>it to me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, as soon as the autograph<n>event is over,
Agnes Digital starts<n>taking control of things.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Why don't we make a<n>separate area
for this game? That<n>way, there's no danger of
anyone<n>getting accidentally hit and injured.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Once the game is finished, we shouldmake some time for photos. I knowI'd want a pic for my lock screen ifit was me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Fan Fest improves right<n>before my
eyes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Today was truly a spectacular<n>success—almost as
if there was<n>some figure working in the shadows.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That was Agnes Digital. Apparently,<n>she followed
all of the rules to a T<n>and was still able to
incorporate so<n>much detail...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Digital! Not half bad! We really<n>killed it today,
thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Those cute little extras<n>you
suggested for the cafe and food<n>stalls were a
huge hit! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: It was totally buono! Thank you,<n>Digital! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
H-h-huuuh? You're all too kind... I<n>just did what I
could...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's Digital for ya! She made so<n>many changes,
yet we didn't have a<n>single problem!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Today, Digital is the real hero! Let's<n>toss her in
the air! Everyone, get in<n>formation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait, what's going on?! Everyone?<n>All at once?!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Hip, hip, hooray!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat is happening heeeeere?!<n>Are you all
goddesseees?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today, Agnes Digital has become a<n>runner with
fans inside of Tracen<n>Academy as well.
